name: Tsakos Energy Navigation Ltd Series E Fixed-to-Floating Rate Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Shares par value $1.00
summary: Tsakos Energy Navigation Ltd. is an international provider of seaborne crude oil and petroleum product transportation services. This specific ticker represents their Series E Fixed-to-Floating Rate Cumulative Redeemable Perpetual Preferred Shares. The company's headquarters are in Athens, Greece.
